jsonLd.title: Licious is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
